hooks.command:
BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current); [ -n "$BRANCH" ] && [ "$BRANCH" != "main" ] && git push -u origin "$BRANCH" && (gh pr view --json number -q .number 2>/dev/null || gh pr create --base main --fill --body 'Auto-created by Claude Code

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/claude-code)') 2>/dev/null || true
hooks.statusMessage: Push et création PR en cours...

hooks.command: branch=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$branch" ] || [ "$branch" = "main" ] || [ "$branch" = "master" ] && exit 0; sentinel="/tmp/.jotly_dev_${branch//\//_}"; [ -f "$sentinel" ] && exit 0; pr=$(gh pr view --json number,title -q '"PR #\(.number): \(.title)"' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$pr" ]; then touch "$sentinel"; echo "$pr"; echo "ACTION:review"; exit 2; fi; ahead=$(git rev-list origin/main..HEAD --count 2>/dev/null || echo "0"); if [ "$ahead" -gt "0" ]; then touch "$sentinel"; echo "Branche '$branch' — $ahead commit(s) non poussé(s), aucune PR."; echo "ACTION:push"; exit 2; fi; exit 0
hooks.rewakeSummary: Dev terminé — push ou review requis
